mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_risk_exposure ( symbol, total_long_qty, total_short_qty, net_exposure, net_exposure_usd, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{quantity}, 0, #{quantity}, #{quantity} * #{markPrice}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_long_qty = total_long_qty + VALUES(total_long_qty), net_exposure = total_long_qty - total_short_qty, net_exposure_usd = (total_long_qty - total_short_qty) * #{markPrice}, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO t_risk_exposure ( symbol, total_long_qty, total_short_qty, net_exposure, net_exposure_usd, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, 0, #{quantity}, -#{quantity}, -#{quantity} * #{markPrice}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_short_qty = total_short_qty + VALUES(total_short_qty), net_exposure = total_long_qty - total_short_qty, net_exposure_usd = (total_long_qty - total_short_qty) * #{markPrice}, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT symbol, total_long_qty, total_short_qty, net_exposure, net_exposure_usd, updated_at FROM t_risk_exposure WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
